title: I bought PolyFront MEV bot here what I know so far, and I have questions
author: JasminJovanna
selftext:
I bought PolyFront MEV bot here what I know so far, and I have questions

I’ve been on Polymarket for a while and decided to pull the trigger on PolyFront. I have the bot running.

The dashboard looks exactly like advertised:

	•	Win rate showing 85%+

	•	Avg profit \~$18/trade

	•	Latency 11ms

	•	Market scanner detecting opportunities in real-time

But I’m not fully sure I understand what’s happening under the hood, and I want to talk to people who’ve been running it longer.

My main questions:

	1.	Is this actually front-running via Polygon mempool, or is it just fast order book sniping? Polymarket uses a centralized CLOB by the time something hits the chain, isn’t the trade already matched?

	2.	What settings are you using? Position sizing, filters, specific market categories?

	3.	How long have you been running it and does the edge hold over time or decay?

	4.	Any risks I should know about account bans, capital at risk, edge cases?

Not here to hype it or trash it. Just want real talk from people actually running this thing.
